Re
Farn PolrucAI- PRACTTcES CouvrrssroN
428 J Street . Suite 620 r Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 r Fax (916) 322-0886
December 9,2003
Steve L. Andriese, Executive Director
Mountain-Valley Emergency Medical
Services Agency
1101 Standiford Avenue, Suite Dl
Modesto, CA 95350
Your Request for Advice
Our FiIe No. W-03-145
Dear Mr. Andriese
This letter is in response to your request for advice on behalf of the Calaveras
County Emergency Medical Services Committee ("EMCC') regarding the conflict-of-
interest provisions of the Political Reform Act (the 'Act').r Previously, the FppC has
advised you that the members of the committee are public officials and the committee is
subject to the disclosure and disqualification provisions of the Act. (Andriese Advice
Letter, No. A-03-016; Andriese Advice Letter,No. 4-02-276.) As you know from our
prior telephone conversations, we have been attempting to answer your inquiry as an
informal advice letter and have been seeking information regarding a particular
govemmental office or decision. This information has not been provided, therefore we
have determined that we are unable to answer your request for advice.
This letter is to notiff you that we have withdrawn the above captioned request
for advice. However, we are providing you with some reference material that may help
answer your general questions and, if necessary, help you formulate a more specific
question relating to the Act. It is our policy not to answer purely hlpothetical questions,
or questions where the facts presented are insufficient or too vague to render specific
advice. (Regulation 18329(h.)Q)(B), (8XC) and (cxa)@), (F).) Enclosed youwill find
copies of section 82030 (definition of income), regulation 18232 (expanded definition of
income), regulation 18707.4 (exception for appointed boards and commissions), "Can I
Vote? Conflicts of lnterest Overview" pamphlet (explanation of the Eighhstep Conflict-
ol Interest Analysis), and the Ennis Advice Letter, No. 4-03-180.
I Government Code sections 81000 - gl}l4. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections
18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.


File No. W-03-145
Page No. 2
If you need additional assistance in the future, please submit another inquiry. Or,
if you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-
s660.
Sincerely,
Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel
By:
Galena West
Counsel, Le gal Division
Enclosures
